summary: Iteration 38: All 3 P0 features VERIFIED. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements confirmed working.

P0-1_tip_distribution.description: Tips go ONLY to the specific bartender who handled the order, NOT split among all staff

evidence.backend_test: test_04_record_tip_for_closed_session: Tip $3.6 goes ONLY to Carlos Silva at 100% proportion
evidence.manager_dashboard: Carlos Silva: tips=$7.2, while other staff show tips=$0

P0-2_payment_flow_consistency.description: Both Tap and Table modules force payment selection before order confirmation

tap_module.confirm_order_btn: DISABLED with cursor-not-allowed until payment selected

P0-3_inside_now_panel.description: VenueHomePage shows ALL active guests with names, entry times, consumption status, and tab IDs

evidence.api_endpoint: GET /api/pulse/inside returns all 7 guests with required fields

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 P0 features verified: (1) Tips now attributed to specific bartender only, (2) Both Tap and Table modules require payment selection before confirming orders, (3) VenueHomePage Inside Now panel shows all 7 guests with names, entry times, consumption status, and tab IDs. Backend uses PostgreSQL for transactional data. Demo seed creates 7 guests. Use data-testid attributes for UI testing.
